# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - http://global-app.example.com
        - https://global-app.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - PATCH
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
    tags:
      - global-config
      - cors-global
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 10
      hour: 1000
      limit_by: ip
      policy: local
    tags:
      - global-config
      - rate-limiting-global
services:
  - name: our-api-service
    url: http://our-backend-service:8000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://service-app.example.com
            - https://service-app.example.com
            - https://internal-dashboard.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
            - X-Service-Specific-Header
          credentials: true
          max_age: 7200
        tags:
          - service-config
          - cors-service
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
        tags:
          - service-config
          - auth-service
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          minute: 50
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: local
        tags:
          - service-config
          - rate-limiting-service
routes:
  - name: our-specific-route
    service: our-api-service
    paths:
      - /api/v1/protected
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://route-specific-app.example.com
            - https://route-specific-app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
            - X-Client-Request-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 1800
        tags:
          - route-config
          - cors-route
      - name: jwt
        config:
          claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
        tags:
          - route-config
          - auth-route
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 2
          minute: 20
          limit_by: header
          header_name: X-User-ID
          policy: local
        tags:
          - route-config
          - rate-limiting-route
